import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/UnifiedDocumentViewerModal.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/UnifiedDocumentViewerModal.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { X, Download, CheckCircle, Clock, User, FileText, Tag } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { useApp } from "/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx";
export function UnifiedDocumentViewerModal({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  document,
  mode,
  onAcknowledge,
  onApprove,
  onReject
}) {
  _s();
  const { addAuditLog } = useApp();
  const [acknowledged, setAcknowledged] = useState(false);
  const [signature, setSignature] = useState("");
  const [rejectReason, setRejectReason] = useState("");
  const [showRejectModal, setShowRejectModal] = useState(false);
  const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false);
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  const handleAcknowledge = () => {
    if (!acknowledged || !signature.trim()) {
      alert("Please check the acknowledgment box and provide your signature");
      return;
    }
    setProcessing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (onAcknowledge) {
        onAcknowledge(document.id, signature);
        addAuditLog({
          action: "Document Acknowledged",
          details: `Acknowledged document: ${document.title}`
        });
      }
      setProcessing(false);
      setAcknowledged(false);
      setSignature("");
      onClose();
    }, 800);
  };
  const handleApprove = () => {
    setProcessing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (onApprove) {
        onApprove(document.id);
        addAuditLog({
          action: "Document Approved",
          details: `Approved document: ${document.title}`
        });
      }
      setProcessing(false);
      onClose();
    }, 800);
  };
  const handleReject = () => {
    if (!rejectReason.trim()) {
      alert("Please provide a reason for rejection");
      return;
    }
    setProcessing(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (onReject) {
        onReject(document.id, rejectReason);
        addAuditLog({
          action: "Document Rejected",
          details: `Rejected document: ${document.title}. Reason: ${rejectReason}`
        });
      }
      setProcessing(false);
      setRejectReason("");
      setShowRejectModal(false);
      onClose();
    }, 800);
  };
  const handleDownload = () => {
    addAuditLog({
      action: "Document Downloaded",
      details: `Downloaded document: ${document.title}`
    });
    alert(`📥 Downloading: ${document.title}`);
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [

_s(UnifiedDocumentViewerModal, "dcZKCJn2FHiYdpS9Sli5EmZzuTo=", false, function() {
  return [useApp];
});
_c = UnifiedDocumentViewerModal;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "UnifiedDocumentViewerModal");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/UnifiedDocumentViewerModal.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/UnifiedDocumentViewerModal.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
